zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Chandler於1500年10月出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾時，他的父親Thomas Chandler25歲，母親Mary Agnes Tate28歲。他於1525年與Agnes Bishop在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1554年5月23日在他的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Chandler于1500年10月出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾时，他的父亲Thomas Chandler25岁，母亲Mary Agnes Tate28岁。他于1525年与Agnes Bishop在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1554年5月23日在他的家乡享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Chandler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a maker and seller of candles, from Anglo-Norman French chandeler ‘maker or seller of candles’ (Old French chandelier, Late Latin candelarius, a derivative of candela ‘candle’). While a medieval chandler no doubt made and sold other articles beside candles, the extended sense of modern English chandler does not occur until the 16th century. The name may also, more rarely, have denoted someone who was responsible for the lighting arrangements in a large house, or else one who owed rent in the form of wax or candles.

variants.name: Candler
meanings: English (East Anglia and southeastern England): variant of   Chandler  .
German: variant of Kandler and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Candler is very rare in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Chandler was born in October 1500, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Chandler, was 25 and his mother, Mary Agnes Tate, was 28. He married Agnes Bishop in 1525, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 23 May 1554, in his hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Chandler est né en octobre 1500, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Chandler, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary Agnes Tate, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Bishop en 1525, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 mai 1554, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Chandler im Oktober 1500 in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Chandler 25 und seine Mutter Mary Agnes Tate 28. Er hat 1525 in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England Agnes Bishop geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Mai 1554 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Agnes Bishop nel 1525, nel Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Chandlerが1500年10月にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Chandlerは25歳，母Mary Agnes Tateは28歳であった。1525年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードでAgnes Bishopと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1554年5月23日に故郷で53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Chandler(이)가 1500년 10월 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Chandler(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Agnes Tate(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1525년 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 Agnes Bishop(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1554년 5월 23일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Chandler nasceu em outubro de 1500, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Chandler, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mary Agnes Tate, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Bishop em 1525, em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de maio de 1554, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Chandler родился октябрь 1500 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Chandler было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Agnes Tate, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Bishop в 1525 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 23 мая 1554 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
